name: Stranded
description:
You are stranded on an uninhabited island after your cruise ship crashes in the South Pacific, with the reality that rescue may never come. 

Group 2- From the left: Mei, Marc, Xiao, Pierre, Ivan.
Group 1- [Matthew, Lily, David, Dylan & Thomas.](https://www.janitorai.com/characters/a3d5f2a2-1055-4784-85e7-bc4d8d1623ab_character-stranded)

Tag: Adventure, Action, Otome, Romance, Love, Drama, Survival.
